description: Founded and led all product, engineering, and business operations for a production SaaS platform serving real paying customers in the pet care industry
Defined product roadmap, prioritized features based on customer feedback, and managed the full delivery lifecycle from concept through launch
Architected and developed a multi-tenant SaaS platform using Next.js with automated infrastructure provisioning, subscription management, and dedicated per-customer application deployment
Engineered automated provisioning pipeline integrating Neon PostgreSQL, DigitalOcean, and Resend to dynamically create dedicated databases, cloud instances, and email services for each new customer
Implemented Stripe-based subscription and billing system supporting tiered plans, recurring payments, checkout sessions, and a self-service customer billing portal

position: Software Developer II & Technical Project Manager
description: Served as project manager for multiple client applications, owning project schedules, status updates, risk communication, and biweekly invoice delivery to clients and stakeholders
Led software development teams and coordinated production release schedules to ensure seamless deployments, on-time project delivery, and generated over $1.25 million in revenue
Integrated existing client applications with third-party APIs spanning AI-powered sewer condition assessments and non-profit content management systems
Developed custom REST APIs in .NET 6 to meet client-specific requirements, ensuring scalability, security, and seamless integration with existing systems
Refactored API endpoints for an agricultural client, resulting in an average 162% reduction in response times
Delivered custom software solutions for small to medium-sized businesses in an agile environment, collaborating cross-functionally to scope, build, and ship on schedule
Scoped and delivered a payment infrastructure overhaul using Stripe Custom Connect, enabling the secure transfer of over $6,000,000 to users
Identified a recurring invoicing inefficiency at a hospital client and delivered an automated PDF invoicing system, streamlining billing workflows and reducing manual effort
Led modernization of the company's legacy timekeeping application, migrating from Windows Forms to a React single-page web application
Improved internal Vue and .NET project templates to reduce ramp-up time on new client engagements
Studied the neuronal and behavioral changes in zebra fish when presented with a visual stimulus to invoke a response
Analyzed data using Python and FIGI to clearly understand the impact stimulates had on neural pathways
Bred zebra fish with genetic mutations to observe the effect in the optic nerve
